stack.idtx_flow: OpenUSD Godot adapter (https://github.com/v-sekai-multiplayer-fabric/idtx-flow-v-sekai); imports .usda → .escn and exports .escn → .usda; build-time dependency baker links against. Tracked by CHI-254.
stack.uro: Elixir/Phoenix; `mix phx.server` via launchd; uro-ZZZZ.chibifire.com; 2.0 GB
stack.crdb: CockroachDB single-node via Homebrew (cockroachdb/tap/cockroach); reachable only by uro; crdb-WWWW.chibifire.com; 2.0 GB; certs under secrets/local/
stack.zone_a: Native Godot headless from multiplayer-fabric-godot fork; binds UDP :4433 (no root needed for :443); zone-XXXX.chibifire.com; 2.0 GB
stack.zone_b: Second zone server, identical to zone_a but distinct UDP port and plist label
stack.baker: Native binary; watches local inbox/ directory; converts incoming USD via idtx_flow then writes to local casync-seed/; baker-AAAA.chibifire.com; 2.0 GB
stack.obs: otelcol-contrib via Homebrew; OTLP receivers on default ports; obs-AAAA.chibifire.com; 2.0 GB

pass_conditions.idtx_flow_roundtrip_ok: idtx-flow-v-sekai CI passes: a fixture .usda imports to .escn and exports back to .usda with no diff (CHI-254 acceptance)
pass_conditions.baker_inbox_ok: drop a fixture .usda into inbox/, observe .scn seed written under casync-seed/ within 5 s
pass_conditions.uro_http_ok: `curl -s http://localhost:4000/health` returns 200 and uro logs show CRDB connection accepted
pass_conditions.zone_b_udp_ok: second zone responds on its bound UDP port
pass_conditions.obs_otlp_ok: OTLP HTTP receiver on 4318 accepts a synthetic span via curl

win_condition: All seven items at phase=3, all seven stack_ready flags up, all seven pass_conditions met. Data-flow chain end-to-end verified: drop a .usda into baker's inbox → uro serves the converted bundle over HTTP → zone_a/zone_b instance it; crdb only reached via uro.
dataflow: idtx_flow (build-time, CHI-254) → baker (CHI-247, produces .scn seeds) → uro CDN (depends on crdb for metadata) → zone_a/zone_b (pull scenes from uro, CHI-248). obs is independent observability infra.
